name: codex-security
description: Repository, diff, and deep multi-pass security scan workflows adapted from the Codex Security plugin.
author: OpenAI
tryAsking: $security-scan Run a security scan on this repository
$security-diff-scan Review this branch diff for security regressions
$deep-security-scan Run a deep repository-wide security scan

slashCommands.name: security-scan
slashCommands.description: Run a repository-wide or scoped-path Codex Security scan

slashCommands.name: security-diff-scan
slashCommands.description: Run a security review of a Git-backed diff

slashCommands.name: deep-security-scan
slashCommands.description: Run a deeper multi-pass repository-wide Codex Security scan

agentRoles.name: codex-security-reviewer
agentRoles.description: Runs defensive code security review, candidate validation, and attack-path analysis.
agentRoles.systemPrompt: You are a defensive application security reviewer. Stay grounded in source evidence, preserve concrete affected lines, avoid exploit execution unless explicitly authorized, and write auditable artifacts for every security claim.
